rationale: The Pareto front strongly favors row_interval=20 and low C (0.001-0.03), suggesting heavy regularization is key. High equity trials use higher edge_threshold (0.05-0.065) with higher kelly_mult (0.35-0.38) and max_frac near 0.21-0.24. depth_skew and depth_ratio are aliases (collinear), so drop depth_skew to reduce redundancy. Also drop ret_60s (collinear with ret_30s) and range_30s (collinear with rolling_std_30s) to improve calibration. Tighten C range around the Pareto cluster and focus row_interval on 20.
